@graph.name: Land Rover models fitted with the 200Tdi / 300Tdi

mainEntity.name: How much does a 200Tdi or 300Tdi engine replacement cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: A reconditioned 200Tdi or 300Tdi typically costs £3,000–£5,500 supply only, with used units from £1,000–£2,000. Fitting adds £900–£2,500 depending on labour rates and vehicle access.

Yes — both are widely considered among the most reliable Land Rover engines ever built. Their fully mechanical fuel systems, lack of complex electronics, and simple OHV design make them exceptionally durable, with many exceeding 250,000–300,000 miles.

mainEntity.name: What is the most common 200Tdi / 300Tdi failure?

acceptedAnswer.text: Head gasket failure from overheating is the most common serious issue — typically caused by cooling system neglect. Early 300Tdi units also suffered timing belt idler alignment problems, and 200Tdi crank dampers can disintegrate.

mainEntity.name: Which Land Rover models use the 200Tdi / 300Tdi?

acceptedAnswer.text: The 200Tdi and 300Tdi powered three core Land Rover models: the Defender (90/110), Discovery Series 1, and Range Rover Classic.

With proper maintenance, 200Tdi and 300Tdi engines routinely exceed 250,000 miles, with many well-maintained examples reaching 300,000+ miles. Regular timing belt changes every 80,000 km (~50,000 miles) and cooling system maintenance are key to achieving this lifespan.

hero.h1: Land Rover 200Tdi / 300Tdi Engine — Specs, Reliability & Replacement Cost
hero.subHeadline: The Land Rover 200Tdi and 300Tdi are 2.5-litre turbo diesels — legendary for bulletproof mechanical reliability and global field-repairability. Backed by real UK enquiries in 2025 [EM-VERIFIED].

verdictRating.confidence: 85% confidence — based on enthusiast consensus, specialist workshop data, and long-term owner reports.

rows.score: 16 (Midpoint of Reconditioned (Supply Only) range: £3,000–£5,500 → £4,250 midpoint → falls in £3,000–£4,999 bracket → 16)
20 (Fully mechanical, no ECU, parts widely available, field-repairable anywhere — the gold standard)
16 (300Tdi parts well-supported; 200Tdi parts available but more expensive and slightly harder to source)
12 (Reconditioned cost (~£4,250 midpoint) as % of lowest typical vehicle value (Defender/Disco 1, ~£6,000–£8,000) = 53–70% → falls in 45–59% bracket → 12)

verdictRating.oneLineVerdict: The 200Tdi and 300Tdi are among the most reliable diesel fours ever built — both are fully mechanical and simple to fix anywhere — buy on condition and documented history.

compatibility.crossBrandNote: Exclusive to Land Rover — no cross-brand fitment.

costGuide.labourEstimate: Fitting a 200Tdi or 300Tdi typically takes 15–25 hours at £65–£95/hr (independent) or £110–£160/hr (London/SE dealer) [INDUSTRY ESTIMATE].
costGuide.sharedCostNote: Omitted — engine is exclusive to Land Rover.
